title: Small plane’s unexpected landing sparks emergency response in New York City
summary: A seaplane with eight passengers made an emergency landing in Manhattan's East River on July 6, 2026, triggering a coordinated emergency response. All occupants were rescued with only minor injuries reported. The incident demonstrates emergency services coordination but is geographically outside Syracuse municipal jurisdiction.
processing_notes: Article is NYC-centric with no direct Syracuse municipal relevance or policy implications
